segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with an upbeat music track accompanying a vibrant montage of school supplies on shelves at Target, with text overlays announcing 'school supplies shopping @ target' and 'travel & giveaway.' Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White' logo, then appears in her car, greeting viewers with an enthusiastic "Hey guys, what's up? It's Kylin, welcome back to my channel." She explains her destination, "We are going to Target and we are going back to school shopping," driven by viewer demand as she wants to "give the people what they want." Kylin, speaking with expressive hand gestures, clarifies that while she needs some items, the main purpose is a giveaway for "one lucky winner," before excitedly declaring, "Let's head on over to the one and only Target. Let's go!" The scene transitions to an exterior shot of the Target store, followed by her entering the brightly lit interior. Inside, as the upbeat music continues, she walks through colorful displays of school supplies, addressing the camera, "Alright guys, we just got here in Target. We're gonna shop around, get our back to school supplies." She mentions her intention to buy items like gel pens and highlighters, as the camera pans across shelves filled with various stationery, including brands like Sharpie and Pilot, before she exclaims, "You guys, I found all of the..." indicating her discovery of desired items.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video opens with a vibrant montage of school supplies on shelves at Target, with text overlays reading 'school supplies shopping @ target' and 'travel & giveaway,' accompanied by upbeat music. The scene transitions to a young woman, Kylin, sitting in the driver’s seat of a car, wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White' logo and long dark hair. She greets the audience, explaining that she’s heading to Target for back-to-school shopping, driven by viewer demand, and announces a giveaway for one lucky winner. She gestures expressively while speaking, then the video cuts to an exterior shot of the Target store, followed by her entering the store. Inside, she walks through the brightly lit aisles, passing colorful displays of school supplies, and speaks directly to the camera, mentioning her intention to buy items like gel pens and highlighters. The camera pans across shelves filled with pens, markers, and other stationery, including brands like Sharpie and Pilot, as she continues her shopping journey.

audio_updated_entities.Kylin: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White' logo, who greets viewers enthusiastically, identifies herself as "Kylin," and explains she is going back-to-school shopping at Target due to viewer demand, also announcing a giveaway for "one lucky winner." She speaks with expressive hand gestures and an excited tone, confirming her arrival at Target and her intent to find supplies like gel pens and highlighters.
audio_updated_entities.Target Store: A brightly lit retail environment, confirmed by Kylin as her destination for back-to-school shopping, featuring colorful school supply displays, shelves stocked with pens, markers, and other stationery, including prominent signage and brands like Sharpie and Pilot.
audio_updated_entities.School Supplies: Various stationery items, including gel pens, highlighters, markers, and notebooks, displayed on shelves with price tags and brand labels like 'Sharpie S NOTE' and 'Pilot Fineliner,' which Kylin explicitly states she intends to purchase.

segments.integrated_caption: Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt, actively browses the brightly lit school supply section of a Target Store, her hand adorned with a silver ring frequently visible as she examines items. She begins by looking at various highlighters, including Sharpie S NOTE and Zebra Mildliner sets, stating in a clear, conversational voice, "I think I definitely want to get some of these" and plans to get the "midliners" for a giveaway. She then picks up a set of Yoobi color-changing markers, noting their charitable aspect ('YOU BUY, YOOBI GIVES'), and places them into her red shopping basket. Moving on to notebooks, she expresses, "I really like the Five Star notebook," and selects a green one with dividers, commenting, "I really like this color" and "This is a hefty one." She also chooses a plain white notebook and a simple, solid-colored wide-ruled one, stating, "I just like the simple ones." Finally, she searches for a planner, explaining, "a planner is definitely something I need to get, and I'm also going to get one for the giveaway." She examines a small pink 'Student Planning Calendar' with a floral design, noting, "I like how small this one is, but I don't love..." the color. Throughout her shopping, shelves are organized with orange dividers, displaying price tags and brand labels, while on-screen text provides her thoughts in both English and Chinese.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video follows Kylin as she browses the school supply section of Target Store, focusing on stationery items. She begins by examining a variety of highlighters, including Sharpie S NOTE and Zebra Mildliner sets, expressing interest in their colors and considering them for purchase. She then picks up a set of Yoobi color-changing markers, noting their charitable aspect ('YOU BUY, YOOBI GIVES'), and adds them to her red shopping basket. Moving on, she explores notebooks, particularly Five Star brand, selecting a green one with dividers and a plain white one, commenting on their utility and size. She also picks up a simple, solid-colored wide-ruled notebook, appreciating its minimal design. Finally, she searches for a planner, expressing a need for one, and examines a small pink 'Student Planning Calendar' with a floral design, though she notes she doesn't love the color. Throughout, the shelves are brightly lit and organized with orange dividers, displaying price tags and brand labels like 'Sharpie' and 'Pilot'. Her hand, adorned with a silver ring, is frequently visible as she handles the items, and on-screen text provides her thoughts in both English and Chinese.

segments.integrated_caption: In a brightly lit Target store, Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, actively browses the vibrant school supply displays. She begins by examining a pink 'Organized' planner, expressing her preference for its 'color scheme' and academic layout, while also noting her fondness for Five Star brand items, stating, "I love the Five Star brand." Moving to the pen section, she picks up a pack of Sharpie Clear View highlighters, commenting, "I do love the Clear View Sharpies," and decides to get them for a giveaway, also considering regular Sharpie highlighters for the same purpose. Kylin confirms, "we're here in the actual like pen section," and plans to get a colorful set of Paper Mate gel pens for the giveaway, remarking on the extensive selection: "They have so many pen options, it's actually crazy." She considers standard black pens but emphasizes her love for 'a variety pack' and 'so many color options.' She then selects Post-it notes, saying, "Let me also get some Post-its for the giveaway as well," and adds black gel pens to her red shopping basket with circular perforations. Remembering, she states, "I need to get pencils for the giveaway as well," picking up a pack of BIC mechanical pencils, which she deems "the best pack in my opinion." Finally, she adds a set of Yoobi markers to her basket, noting the variety of options like Pilot and Uniball pens available on the well-stocked shelves with visible price tags.
segments.visual_original_caption: Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, is actively browsing school supplies in the brightly lit Target Store. She begins by examining a pink 'Organized' planner, expressing her preference for its color scheme and academic layout, while also noting her fondness for Five Star brand items. She then moves to the pen section, where she picks up a pack of Sharpie Clear View highlighters, commenting on their suitability for a giveaway. She continues to select various stationery items, including a colorful set of Paper Mate gel pens, black gel pens, and Post-it notes, placing them into her red shopping basket with circular perforations. She also grabs a pack of BIC mechanical pencils and a set of Yoobi markers, adding them to her basket. As she moves along, she highlights the variety of options available, such as different pen colors and brands like Pilot and Uniball, and expresses her intention to get more items for a giveaway. The shelves are stocked with vibrant school supplies, including folders, markers, and pens, with visible price tags and brand labels like 'Sharpie S NOTE' and 'Pilot Fineliner'. The environment remains consistent with bright lighting and organized displays, emphasizing the colorful and abundant selection of school supplies.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens in a brightly lit Target Store, where Kylin, a young woman in a white 'White Fox' t-shirt, browses colorful file folders. Her clear, conversational voice is heard commenting on "these ones" and stating, "Obviously we need to get some folders and I love the five-star ones, so we'll get one of these." She finds "really cute ones" and describes a white floral folder and a pink geometric one, both priced at $2.39, as "really pretty." Deciding to take "one of each," she places them into her red shopping basket with a distinct clunk. The camera then pans to a wall of backpacks, and Kylin, holding her now heavier basket, turns to the camera with an excited, expressive look, remarking that "backpacks have gotten significantly cuter over the years." She then struggles slightly, noting, "Alright guys, our basket pretty full and very heavy right now. I'm barely able to lift it up," and further adds, "she's getting really heavy right now," while also complaining, "I'm like sweating in here. It is so hot." Moving to a section of 3-inch heavy-duty Avery binders, available in gray, purple, and other colors at $11.39, Kylin inspects a gray one. Despite finding "the actual binder section" and acknowledging "a lot of options here," she states her decision to go to Staples for binders, explaining, "I like the Staple brand binders the best" because "the Staple ones are just more durable." The camera sweeps across shelves displaying various school supplies like notebooks and folders, before panning to an empty pegboard wall with only a few remaining items, visually confirming low stock, which Kylin alludes to by saying, "I don't even know if they're all stocked yet because..." Throughout, the consistent ambient hum of the Target Store is audible.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video begins with Kylin browsing through a display of colorful file folders in the Target Store, selecting a white folder with a floral design and a pink one with a geometric pattern, both priced at $2.39. She comments on their cuteness and decides to take one of each, placing them into her Red Shopping Basket. The camera then pans to a wall of backpacks, where Kylin, holding her basket, turns to the camera with an expressive look, seemingly excited about her finds. She continues her shopping journey, moving to a section of binders, where she examines several 3-inch heavy-duty binders by Avery, available in gray, purple, and other colors, priced at $11.39. She picks up a gray binder, inspects it, and places it in her basket. The camera then sweeps across the shelves, showing a variety of school supplies including notebooks and folders, before panning to an empty pegboard wall with only a few remaining items, indicating the store is running low on stock. Throughout, Kylin’s white t-shirt with the 'White Fox' logo is visible, and the Target Store’s bright lighting and organized displays remain consistent, with signage like 'all in motion' and 'only at Target' visible in the background.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a close-up of shelves stocked with school supplies, including file folders and binders in pastel and neutral tones, with price tags visible, accompanied by upbeat instrumental background music. Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, is seen browsing the brightly lit aisles of Target Store. She remarks, "There's like nothing on this wall yet. Maybe I came too early," and notes, "They have some really cute whiteboards too, but I definitely don't need that." She continues, expressing nostalgia, "They have so much cute locker stuff here, and it's really making me miss when I had a locker many, many, many years ago." As she speaks, she picks up a purple 'Reinforced Quad Ruled' notebook, examining it closely before placing it into her red shopping basket, which features circular perforations. She explains her shopping strategy, "Alright guys, I'm just walking around right now, seeing if there's anything I forgot. I am going to go to Staples too though, so whatever I didn't get here, I can always get over there." She adds, "But we're doing pretty good so far. I got a lot of stuff, and I got a lot of good stuff for the giveaway too, which I'm excited for," promising to explain the rules later. She gestures expressively while speaking to the camera, occasionally glancing around at the colorful displays of school supplies, including orange bins filled with notebooks and folders, with signage like 'college ruled notebooks' and 'all in motion' visible. She points out, "They also have some plain like composition notebooks here as well. I haven't used one of these in a while though," and mentions "some loose leaf and graph paper." At one point, she holds up the red shopping basket, making a peace sign, while text on screen reads 'gets so awkward filming in public,' indicating her self-awareness. She then whispers, "Why are there so many people here today? I probably should have made a list on my phone of everything to get so that I didn't forget anything, 'cause I really don't want to forget anything for..." as she continues to navigate the aisle, passing shelves with water bottles and other stationery, maintaining an engaged and animated demeanor throughout the store's general ambiance.

The environment is vibrant, with signage like 'college ruled notebooks' and 'all in motion' visible. She continues to navigate the aisle, passing shelves with water bottles and other stationery, maintaining an engaged and animated demeanor throughout.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white 'White Fox' t-shirt, walking through the brightly lit aisles of Target Store, engaging directly with the camera. She speaks about not having a list and apologizing if she's missing anything, noting she thinks she has "more than enough" and that they're also going to "a whole 'nother store." She gestures expressively as she browses colorful school supplies, including shelves stocked with vibrant water bottles and backpacks. She expresses her love for "Simple Modern" water bottles, commenting on their good size and identifying one as "so me" and another as "really cute," before picking up a purple 'SIMPLE MODERN' water bottle. The camera then pans across shelves displaying various backpacks and lunch bags, including a Hello Kitty design, as Kylin remarks on the abundance of backpacks now, contrasting it with her past experience of never being able to find one in-store and always having to go online. She then moves to a display of school supplies, selecting a green-packaged Ticonderoga pencil pack, recalling how she "always hated" having to use "number two pencils" for Scantrons and testing, preferring mechanical pencils. She places the pencils into her red shopping basket, which already contains a purple notebook. She continues to browse, picking up a pack of ruled index cards, stating they are her "favorite for studying" and that she prefers "colored ones" because they're "more exciting" than plain white ones, before placing them in the basket. The camera briefly focuses on her holding a black smartphone, then cuts to a close-up of her hand placing a gray binder into the basket. The scene ends with Kylin holding up the red shopping basket, making a peace sign, while she verbally expresses "That is so awkward, oh my gosh," and the on-screen text 'gets so awkward filming in public' appears briefly. She then notes the time is "2:39" and she's been there for "an hour already," which is "very long," before stating they are "gonna check out now." The distinct sound of a scanner is heard as she concludes her shopping. Throughout the segment, background music plays, complementing the retail atmosphere of Target Store.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with the distinct beeping sounds of a checkout scanner as Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a 'White Fox' t-shirt, processes school supplies at a Target counter. She scans a pack of Ticonderoga pencils and a purple notebook, placing them into a red Target shopping bag with black polka dots. Transitioning to her car, Kylin holds the red shopping bag and speaks to the camera, gesturing with her hands, exclaiming, "All right guys, we just dropped over $100 on school supplies at Target." She adds that she's "still not even done" and plans to go to Staples, expressing concern that Staples might still be stocking shelves, saying, "there is a chance that I did come a little bit early." The scene then shows her driving, with car sounds audible, as she announces, "we're gonna drive to Staples," counting down "in three, two, one." Upon arrival, an exterior shot of the Staples store with its red and white signage is shown. Inside, Kylin walks through an aisle filled with colorful 3-inch binders and file folders, holding her black smartphone. She states, "All right guys, I am looking for binders," and then confirms, "All right, perfect, we found the binders." The camera pans across shelves displaying gray, red, yellow, green, blue, and purple binders, each labeled '1½ inch' and '100 sheet'. Kylin reaches out to touch a gray binder, noting, "I always love getting the Staples brand binders, the one and a half inch. We'll definitely get one of these." Her movements are deliberate and focused, reflecting her intent to gather school supplies in the utilitarian, well-organized Staples environment.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video begins with Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, at a checkout counter in Target. She places a red shopping basket on the counter and begins scanning items, including a pack of Ticonderoga pencils and a purple notebook, which she then places into a red Target shopping bag with black polka dots. The scene transitions to Kylin sitting in the driver’s seat of a car, holding the red shopping bag and speaking to the camera, gesturing with her hands as she talks. She then drives to a Staples store, shown in an exterior shot with its red and white signage. Inside Staples, Kylin walks through an aisle filled with colorful 3-inch binders and file folders, examining them closely while holding her black smartphone. The camera pans across shelves displaying binders in various colors—gray, red, yellow, green, blue, and purple—each labeled with '1½ inch' and '100 sheet' specifications. Kylin continues to browse, her hand reaching out to touch a gray binder, indicating her selection process. The environment shifts from the bright, colorful Target store to the more utilitarian, red-and-white Staples, with consistent lighting and organized shelving. Her movements are deliberate and focused, reflecting her intent to gather school supplies.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a close-up of a metal display rack showcasing colorful planners and calendars, featuring floral patterns and solid colors with visible price tags. A hand reaches in to pick up a blue floral planner, flipping through its clean, organized pages, while a young woman's voice expresses enthusiasm, saying, "I really like this one," and wishing she had seen it earlier: "I should have waited... this one's so pretty, I would have gotten this one." She continues to admire the designs, noting "this one's really pretty too" and that "they have it in smaller" sizes, recommending, "if you're looking for planners, come to Staples." The camera pans across the shelf, highlighting various designs including an orange cover and a citrus motif, as the voice praises "clipboard ones" and "such a pretty design," adding, "Staples has really stepped up their game." The scene transitions to a different section with red metal shelving, where the hand selects a small, pastel 'twellly' container, followed by 'Mighty Patch' acne strips and colorful sticky notes. The voice identifies these as "so many minis" and "perfect for an emergency kit," specifically mentioning "little vitamins or supplements," "little bandages," and "blemish patches," stating, "all of these would go so perfect in a little emergency kit for school." A 'BUY 3, GET 1 FREE' sign is briefly shown. The segment concludes with a wider shot of Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a 'White Fox' t-shirt, standing in the aisle, gesturing as she speaks directly to the camera, continuing to praise the store's offerings, "I freaking love Liquid IV too. They have so much good stuff," and teasing, "Stay tuned for my emergency kit." She also points out "little beauty blenders" and "hair ties," concluding, "just so much stuff." The retail environment is brightly lit and organized.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video opens with a close-up of a metal display rack filled with colorful planners and calendars, showcasing various designs including floral patterns and solid colors, with price tags clearly visible. A hand reaches in to pick up a planner with a blue floral cover, then flips through its pages, revealing a clean, organized layout. The camera pans across the shelf, highlighting different planner designs, including one with a vibrant orange cover and another with a citrus fruit motif. The scene transitions to a different section of the store, where the same hand selects a small, pastel-colored container labeled 'twellly' from a shelf stocked with travel-sized health and wellness products, including bandages, pain relievers, and hydration supplements. The hand then picks up a box of 'Mighty Patch' acne treatment strips, followed by a pack of colorful sticky notes. The camera briefly focuses on a promotional sign reading 'BUY 3, GET 1 FREE' before shifting to a wider shot of a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, standing in an aisle with red metal shelving. She speaks directly to the camera, gesturing with her hands as she talks, with shelves of office supplies visible behind her. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a retail environment, and the overall atmosphere is calm and organized.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white 'White Fox' t-shirt, filming herself in a brightly lit Staples store. With an enthusiastic and conversational tone, she exclaims, "You guys, I am shook right now by how much Staples has. Staples wasn't playing," as she browses office supplies. She points out unexpected items like "Burt's Bees lip balms" and "mouthwash," encouraging viewers to "come to Staples." She picks up a yellow pack of sticky notes, noting, "I found these ones instead. And this is a really pretty color, so we'll do one of these," before placing it in her red shopping basket. She then selects a light blue Staples 3-Ring View Binder, confirming, "Alright guys, so we got what we came here for, which was binders." As she prepares to check out, she spots a package of Martha Stewart large paper clips, expressing surprise: "Look at these giant paper clips. It's by Martha Stewart too. I didn't know she came out with a stationery line, but it really popped off." She briefly mentions "a giant gold calculator" before the scene transitions to a softly lit home setting. Here, Kylin sits in front of a potted plant, holding up a red Target shopping bag with white polka dots. Speaking directly to the camera with expressive gestures, she announces, "Okay guys, so we're back from Target. I got a big bag of stuff. And now it's time to get into our our haul." She then reveals that "everything here is going to be in the giveaway," instructing viewers to "subscribe, follow my Instagram" to enter, with her handle '@kyla.malloy' displayed on screen.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video begins with Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, filming herself in a Staples store. She browses through office supplies, picking up a yellow pack of sticky notes and examining it before placing it in her red shopping basket. She then moves to a display of colorful 3-ring binders, selecting a light blue Staples 3-Ring View Binder and holding it up to the camera. Next, she inspects a package of Martha Stewart large paper clips, showing them to the camera before moving on. The scene transitions to a home setting where Kylin sits in front of a potted plant, holding up a red Target shopping bag with white polka dots and the Target logo. She speaks directly to the camera, gesturing expressively with her hands, and the on-screen text '@kyla.malloy' appears in the top right corner. The lighting is soft and natural, contrasting with the bright fluorescent lighting of the store. Her demeanor is casual and engaging as she shares her shopping experience.

segments.integrated_caption: The video transitions to a softly lit home setting where Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, sits in front of a gray wall with a large potted plant to her left. Speaking directly to the camera in a clear, conversational tone and using expressive hand gestures, Kylin first discusses a giveaway, instructing viewers to "subscribe," "follow my Instagram," and "comment down below something you're looking forward to in the coming year." On-screen text appears, reinforcing these calls to action: '-subscribe', '-follow my insta', '-comment'. Kylin then transitions to showcasing her school supply haul, humorously stating that "dragging this back into the car was my workout for the day." She displays a white package of Martha Stewart Large Paper Clips, followed by a light blue Staples 3-Ring View Binder and a gray 3-ring binder, explaining she got "two binders from Staples" and chose the "really pretty blue color" because she figured viewers "didn't just want like plain white and black." Next, she holds up a red Target Shopping Bag, announcing it contains "everything that I got from Target." From the bag, she pulls out two patterned notebooks—one with a green geometric design and another with a floral motif—describing the first as a "green mosaic pattern" and expressing her dislike for "paper folders," clarifying they are "the exact same folder, just different designs." She then shows a white spiral notebook with a green label, followed by a mint green spiral notebook, noting she "needed folders" and just got a "plain white Five Star folder" because she's "boring and basic like that."
segments.visual_original_caption: The video transitions to a home setting where Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, sits in front of a gray wall with a large potted plant in a woven basket to her left. She speaks directly to the camera, using expressive hand gestures to emphasize her points. On-screen text appears, listing calls to action: '-subscribe', '-follow my insta', '-comment'. She then holds up a white package of Martha Stewart Large Paper Clips, followed by a Staples 3-Ring View Binder in light blue and a gray 3-ring binder, showing both to the camera. Next, she displays a red Target Shopping Bag, pulling out two patterned notebooks—one with a green geometric design and another with a floral motif—holding them up for comparison. She then shows a white spiral notebook with a green label, followed by a mint green spiral notebook, each briefly displayed before being set aside. The lighting is soft and natural, creating a calm and inviting atmosphere, and the focus remains on Kylin’s interaction with the school supplies she has collected.

segments.integrated_caption: Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, is seated in a softly lit home setting with a gray wall and a large potted plant behind her, speaking directly to the camera in an enthusiastic and conversational tone. She begins by holding up a white Five Star spiral notebook, flipping it to show its 'Fights ink bleed' and '1 Subject' details, while explaining that she got several Five Star notebooks, including a "green one" and two others with "geometric marble" and "swooshy pattern" designs, declaring them "literally the best notebooks out there" and her strong preference. Next, she presents a pink spiral-bound '2025/26 Student Planning Calendar', noting it clearly says "plans on it" and has "dividers." She then displays a cardboard-packaged set of six colorful gel pens, identifying them as "Ubi pens" and expressing her long-standing liking for Ubi school supplies. Following this, she showcases a Paper Mate InkJoy gel pen set with 10 vibrant colors in a clear blister pack, calling them her "favorite pens by Paper Mate" and her "go-to" for years. Finally, she holds up a Paper Mate Clear Point #2 pencil set, also in a blister pack, confirming they are "mechanical ones" and stating her preference for them over standard mechanical pencils before the audio cuts off. Throughout, her light pink manicured nails and silver ring are visible as she gestures, maintaining a calm, organized vlog-style review.
segments.visual_original_caption: Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, is seated in a softly lit home setting with a gray wall and a large potted plant in a woven basket behind her. She speaks directly to the camera, showcasing various school supplies with expressive hand gestures. She begins by holding up a white Five Star spiral notebook, flipping it to show both the front and back covers, which feature branding and product details like 'Fights ink bleed' and '1 Subject'. She then presents a pink spiral-bound '2025/26 Student Planning Calendar' with a 'Planner' label and a 'Pencil' icon. Next, she displays a cardboard-packaged set of six colorful gel pens, followed by a Paper Mate InkJoy gel pen set with 10 vibrant colors in a clear plastic blister pack. She then holds up a Paper Mate Clear Point #2 pencil set with 10 colored pencils, also in a blister pack, and gestures toward the packaging while speaking. Throughout, her nails are neatly manicured with a light pink polish, and she wears a delicate silver ring on her right hand. The environment remains consistent with warm, natural lighting and a calm, organized atmosphere, suggesting a personal vlog-style review or unboxing of school supplies.

She describes Five Star notebooks as 'literally the best notebooks out there,' mentioning she also acquired a 'green one' and others with 'geometric marble' and 'swooshy pattern' designs, highlighting her strong preference for them.

audio_updated_entities.Gel Pens (6-pack): A cardboard-packaged set of six colorful gel pens in pastel shades, held by Kylin. She identifies them as 'Ubi pens' and states she has 'gotten Ubi school supplies in the past and I really like them'.
audio_updated_entities.Paper Mate InkJoy Gel Pen Set: A blister-packaged set of 10 colorful Paper Mate InkJoy gel pens in a rainbow gradient, held by Kylin and displayed prominently. She declares them her 'favorite pens by Paper Mate' and her 'go-to' that she has 'used these every single year'.
audio_updated_entities.Paper Mate Clear Point Pencil Set: A blister-packaged set of 10 colored Paper Mate Clear Point #2 pencils, held by Kylin. She identifies them as 'mechanical ones' and expresses a strong preference for using them 'over like a plain standard mechanical pencil'.

segments.integrated_caption: Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a 'White Fox' t-shirt, sits in a home setting with a gray wall and a large potted plant behind her, showcasing school supplies. She begins by holding up a package of Zebra Mildliner Creative Markers, a 15-color set with chisel and bullet tips, clarifying in her friendly voice, "I don't know if they're markers or highlighters... it's a marker and highlighter in one." She then displays two packs of pastel pink and yellow Post-it sticky notes, noting, "I feel like Post-its are a staple for the school year." Next, she presents a standard pack of Sharpie highlighters in vibrant colors, adding, "I figured you guys would just want some standard ones." Following this, she shows a set of Sharpie paint markers in bold neon shades, enthusiastically describing them as "the clear tip ones because these ones are seriously so great. I love the clear tip so you could see like where you're highlighting." She then holds up a Five Star notebook, flipping it to reveal product details like 'Fights ink bleed' on its back cover. After placing the notebook down, she speaks directly to the camera, mentioning that she also got "some index cards" and "a planner" for herself, expressing her liking for the planner's smaller size. She claps her hands together and concludes by addressing the camera, saying, "I hope you guys enjoyed this back to school shopping vlog. And don't forget to enter the giveaway... I'm going to be announcing the winner at the end of this month both on my Instagram and on here. And with that being said, I'll catch you guys in the next one. Bye guys!" as background music begins to play, transitioning to an end screen featuring a video thumbnail, her circular profile picture, and the cursive text 'subscribe new videos every week'.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment features Kylin, a young woman with long dark hair wearing a white t-shirt with a 'White Fox' logo, seated in a home setting with a gray wall and a large potted plant behind her. She begins by holding up a package of Zebra Mildliner Creative Markers, showcasing the 15-color set with chisel and bullet tips. She then transitions to displaying two packs of Post-it sticky notes in pastel pink and yellow, followed by a pack of Sharpie highlighters in vibrant colors. Next, she presents a set of Sharpie paint markers in bold neon shades, including yellow, pink, and orange. She then holds up a Five Star notebook, flipping it to show both the front and back covers, which feature product details like 'Fights ink bleed' and '1 Subject'. After placing the notebook down, she claps her hands together and speaks directly to the camera with expressive gestures. The segment concludes with a transition to an end screen featuring a thumbnail of a previous video titled 'COLLEGE DORM SHOPPING!! back to school shopping at Target', a circular profile picture of Kylin by the water, and the text 'subscribe new videos every week' in a cursive font.

entity_library.2025/26 Student Planning Calendar: A pink spiral-bound planner labeled '2025/26 Student Planning Calendar' with a 'Planner' title and a 'Pencil' icon, held up by Kylin. She confirms it says 'plans on it' and has 'dividers'.
entity_library.Gel Pens (6-pack): A cardboard-packaged set of six colorful gel pens in pastel shades, held by Kylin. She identifies them as 'Ubi pens' and states she has 'gotten Ubi school supplies in the past and I really like them'.
entity_library.Paper Mate InkJoy Gel Pen Set: A blister-packaged set of 10 colorful Paper Mate InkJoy gel pens in a rainbow gradient, held by Kylin and displayed prominently. She declares them her 'favorite pens by Paper Mate' and her 'go-to' that she has 'used these every single year'.
entity_library.Paper Mate Clear Point Pencil Set: A blister-packaged set of 10 colored Paper Mate Clear Point #2 pencils, held by Kylin. She identifies them as 'mechanical ones' and expresses a strong preference for using them 'over like a plain standard mechanical pencil'.
entity_library.Zebra Mildliner Creative Markers: A 15-color set of markers in a white and blue package, featuring chisel and bullet tips, held up by Kylin who describes them as 'a marker and highlighter in one'.
entity_library.Post-it Sticky Notes: Two packs of sticky notes in pastel pink and yellow, held side-by-side by Kylin who states they are 'just your standard Post-its' and 'a staple for the school year'.
entity_library.Sharpie Highlighters: A pack of four Sharpie highlighters in bright pink, orange, yellow, and blue, displayed in a clear plastic blister pack, which Kylin refers to as 'a standard pack of highlighters'.
entity_library.Sharpie Paint Markers: A pack of three Sharpie paint markers in neon yellow, pink, and orange, shown in a purple and white sunburst-patterned blister pack, which Kylin enthusiastically describes as 'the clear tip ones' that are 'seriously so great' because you can 'see like where you're highlighting'.
entity_library.End Screen: A gradient background with a video thumbnail on the left, a circular profile picture on the right, and cursive text 'subscribe new videos every week' in the center, serving as a call-to-action for viewers.
